name: 08e · Parent w/ crashing child (unwired)
description: Live e2e for subworkflow-failure-propagation. Calls 08c-unwired-failure (a child that always crashes => child NetFailed) via a SubWorkflow node whose error handle is UNWIRED. The child crash must propagate to this parent and, because the parent's SubWorkflow error is unwired, crash the PARENT too (instance 'failed') — instead of hanging at 'running'. Requires 08c to seed first (alphabetical).
